description_long: This courthouse is a stately, two-story brick and stone building with a steeply pitched gray slate roof and ornate architectural detailing. The facade features arched windows, decorative stonework, and a prominent central entryway framed by stone columns and a set of steps. The building's exterior is characterized by its reddish-brown brickwork, rusticated stone base, and symmetrical arrangement of windows and ornamentation. A tall chimney and a rear annex with utility units are visible, along with a fire escape staircase on one side. The structure sits on a raised platform with stone balustrades and lamp posts flanking the main entrance. The overall appearance is historic and institutional, evoking late 19th-century civic architecture.
description: A historic, two-story brick and stone courthouse with a steep gray roof, arched windows, and ornate facade details. The building features a prominent entryway, fire escape, and decorative stonework.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with arched windows, stone columns, and decorative facade details, flanked by lamp posts and a stone balustrade.
description_view_1: The rear view reveals the fire escape staircase, additional arched windows, and the building's annex, with less ornamentation than the front.
description_view_2: The side/rear view highlights the annex with utility units, a tall chimney, and the less decorative back wall, showing rooftop equipment.
description_view_3: The side view displays a secondary entrance, brickwork, and the building's symmetrical window arrangement, with the annex visible to the left.
attribute_facade_ornamentation: The facade features arched windows, rusticated stonework at the base, decorative stone columns, and intricate brick detailing around the windows and roofline.
attribute_entryway_design: The main entryway is framed by robust stone columns and arches, with a set of wide steps leading up to double doors, and is flanked by decorative lamp posts and stone balustrades.
attribute_flag_display: A single flagpole is present to the right of the main entrance, but no flag is currently displayed.
